summary: R2 systems handoff resolves the qa_reviewer REQUEST_CHANGES findings. The invalid main baseline hash was replaced with the verified origin/main commit ef40f3dff442ee16acc479346d8f0409c2ca736e in the gate and process state evidence. The stale JSON-shape probe that expected review_ready was replaced with a final-state R2 probe that validates review_ready_r2 state, the corrected main hash, the R2 handoff, and allowed dirty paths. M3_GATE remains PASS pending independent qa_reviewer acceptance and lead integration; no M4 work was started.

decisions: M3_GATE remains PASS, pending independent qa_reviewer acceptance and lead integration.
The corrected main baseline is ef40f3dff442ee16acc479346d8f0409c2ca736e; git cat-file verifies it exists as a commit.
The stale R1 JSON probe expectation of review_ready is superseded. R2 state is review_ready_r2 for the systems thread and awaiting_r2_review for qa_reviewer.
No product, package, content-source, tool, CI, ADR, roadmap, acceptance-matrix, autonomous-goal doc, manifest, checksum, or validation-report path was modified.
No Human Gate or M4 start is introduced by this R2 correction.
risks: The original R1 handoff remains part of the audit trail; this R2 handoff is the current routed systems evidence after QA request changes.
Formal M3 acceptance still depends on independent qa_reviewer R2 acceptance and lead integration.
requested_action: Re-review the R2 fixes for the corrected main baseline hash and JSON-shape evidence. If accepted, write a valid qa_reviewer handoff routed to lead_orchestrator. Do not start M4 from this review.
